response.justification: The candidate lacks any demonstrable experience in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware optimization, or deep-learning workload analysis — core requirements for the Principal Performance Architect role. Their background is entirely in full-stack web and mobile development, with no evidence of hardware-software co-design, GPU architecture, or performance modeling for AI accelerators, despite extensive software experience.
strengths: Strong full-stack development skills across multiple languages and platforms
Demonstrated open-source contributions and technical leadership
Experience with performance-critical systems and low-latency applications
concerns: No experience with SoC, IP, or AI accelerator hardware modeling
Lacks background in deep learning optimization or GPU architecture
No evidence of system architecture work for cloud infrastructure or hardware manufacturing
